3-body-problem.title: 3 Body Problem
3-body-problem.description: A fateful decision in 1960s China reverberates in the present, where a group of scientists partner with a detective to confront an existential planetary threat.

breaking-bad.title: Breaking-Bad
breaking-bad.description: A high school chemistry teacher diagnosed with inoperable lung cancer turns to manufacturing and selling methamphetamine in order to secure his family's future.

game-of-thrones-house-of-the-dragon.title: Game-of-Thrones-House-of-the-Dragon
game-of-thrones-house-of-the-dragon.description: Based on George R.R. Martin's Fire & Blood, House of the Dragon is set 200 years before the events of Game of Thrones and tells the story of House Targaryen.

mirzapur.title: Mirzapur
mirzapur.description: Mirzapur is an Indian Hindi-language action crime thriller television series created for Amazon Prime Video, by Karan Anshuman, who wrote the script along with Puneet Krishna & Vineet Krishna. Anshuman directed the first season of the series, along with Gurmmeet Singh and Mihit Desai, the latter of whom directed the second season.

squid-game.title: Squid Game
squid-game.description: Hundreds of cash-strapped players accept a strange invitation to compete in children's games. Inside, a tempting prize awaits with deadly high stakes. A survival game that has a whooping 45.6 billion-won prize at stake.

stranger-things.title: Stranger-Things
stranger-things.description: When a young boy disappears, his mother, a police chief and his friends must confront terrifying supernatural forces in order to get him back.

the-boys.title: The Boys
the-boys.description: A group of vigilantes set out to take down corrupt superheroes who abuse their superpowers.

the-witcher-season-3.title: The-Witcher-Season-3
the-witcher-season-3.description: Geralt of Rivia, a solitary monster hunter, struggles to find his place in a world where people often prove more wicked than beasts.

secret-invasion.title: Secret Invasion
secret-invasion.description: Nick Fury and Talos discover a faction of shape-shifting Skrulls who have been infiltrating Earth for years.

peacemaker.title: Peacemaker
peacemaker.description: Picking up where The Suicide Squad (2021) left off, Peacemaker returns home after recovering from his encounter with Bloodsport - only to discover that his freedom comes at a price.

wednesday.title: Wednesday
wednesday.description: Follows Wednesday Addams' years as a student, when she attempts to master her emerging psychic ability, thwart and solve the mystery that embroiled her parents.

the-last-of-us.title: The Last of Us
the-last-of-us.description: After a global pandemic destroys civilization, a hardened survivor takes charge of a 14-year-old girl who may be humanity's last hope.

avatar-the-last-airbender.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
avatar-the-last-airbender.description: A young boy known as the Avatar must master the four elemental powers to save a world at war and fight a ruthless enemy bent on stopping him.

shogun.title: Shōgun
shogun.description: Set in Japan in the year 1600, Lord Yoshii Toranaga is fighting for his life as his enemies on the Council of Regents unite against him, when a mysterious European ship is found marooned in a nearby fishing village.

dune-part-two.title: Dune Part Two
dune-part-two.description: Paul Atreides unites with Chani and the Fremen while on a warpath of revenge against the conspirators who destroyed his family.

money-heist.title: Money Heist
money-heist.description: An unusually charismatic criminal mastermind who goes by The Professor has a plan to pull off the biggest heist in recorded history — to print billions of euros in the Royal Mint of Spain. To help him carry out the ambitious plan, he recruits eight people with certain abilities.

dark.title: Dark
dark.description: A family saga with a supernatural twist, set in a German town where the disappearance of two young children exposes the relationships among four families. Past and present intertwine as the mystery deepens across multiple timelines.

the-mandalorian.title: The Mandalorian
the-mandalorian.description: The travels of a lone bounty hunter in the outer reaches of the galaxy, far from the authority of the New Republic. After the fall of the Empire, a lone Mandalorian gunfighter makes his way through the lawless galaxy with his adorable companion, Grogu.

loki.title: Loki
loki.description: The mercurial villain Loki resumes his role as the God of Mischief in a new series that takes place after the events of Avengers: Endgame. He must navigate the bureaucratic Time Variance Authority and comes face to face with dangerous variants of himself.

the-crown.title: The Crown
the-crown.description: Follows the political rivalries and romance of Queen Elizabeth II's reign and the events that shaped the second half of the twentieth century. A chronicle of the British royal family spanning decades.

peaky-blinders.title: Peaky Blinders
peaky-blinders.description: A gangster family epic set in 1900s England, centering on a gang who sew razor blades in the peaks of their caps, and their fierce leader Tommy Shelby who means to move up in the world.

the-witcher.title: The Witcher
the-witcher.description: Geralt of Rivia, a solitary monster hunter, struggles to find his place in a world where people often prove more wicked than beasts. But when destiny hurtles him toward a powerful sorceress and a young princess with a dangerous secret, the three must learn to navigate a volatile continent together.

arcane.title: Arcane
arcane.description: Set in the utopian region of Piltover and the oppressed underground of Zaun, the story follows the origins of two iconic League of Legends champions — and the power that will tear them apart. Sisters Vi and Jinx find themselves on opposite sides of a war.

the-family-man.title: The Family Man
the-family-man.description: Srikant Tiwari is a middle-class man who also serves as a world-class spy for the National Investigation Agency. He must balance his duty to protect the nation from terrorism with his responsibilities as a family man.

sacred-games.title: Sacred Games
sacred-games.description: A link in their pasts leads an honest cop to a fugitive gang boss, whose cryptic warning sparks a quest to save Mumbai from cataclysm. Based on Vikram Chandra's bestselling novel.

panchayat.title: Panchayat
panchayat.description: Abhishek Tripathi, an engineering graduate, is unable to find a suitable job and reluctantly joins as the secretary of a Panchayat office in the remote village of Phulera in Uttar Pradesh. The series chronicles his journey as he adjusts to rural life.

the-bear.title: The Bear
the-bear.description: A young chef from the fine dining world returns to Chicago to run his family's Italian beef sandwich shop after a heartbreaking death. He must transform both the shop and himself while navigating the chaotic kitchen and difficult staff.

succession.title: Succession
succession.description: The Roy family, known for controlling the biggest media and entertainment company in the world, is exploring what the future will look like for them as their aging father, Logan Roy, begins to step back from the conglomerate.

invincible.title: Invincible
invincible.description: Mark Grayson is a normal teenager except for the fact that his father is the most powerful superhero on the planet, Omni-Man. Shortly after his 17th birthday, Mark begins to develop powers of his own and discovers his father's dark secret.

the-sandman.title: The Sandman
the-sandman.description: After years of imprisonment, Morpheus — the King of Dreams — embarks on a journey across worlds to find what was stolen from him and restore his power. A rich blend of modern myth and dark fantasy woven together.

severance.title: Severance
severance.description: Mark leads a team of office workers whose memories have been surgically divided between their work and personal lives. When a mysterious colleague appears outside of work, it begins a journey to discover the truth about their jobs.

fallout.title: Fallout
fallout.description: In a future devastated by nuclear war, a sheltered vault dweller is forced to venture into the irradiated wasteland for the first time. Based on the iconic video game series, the show explores factions battling for control of what remains.

reacher.title: Reacher
reacher.description: Jack Reacher, a veteran military police investigator, has just entered civilian life. When he is falsely accused of murder, Reacher discovers a deep-rooted conspiracy in a small town. Based on Lee Child's best-selling novel series.

the-penguin.title: The Penguin
the-penguin.description: Set in the world of The Batman, Oz Cobb — known as The Penguin — rises through the Gotham criminal underworld following the death of Carmine Falcone, seizing the opportunity to fill the power vacuum and build his own empire.

shogun-series.title: Shōgun
shogun-series.description: Set in 1600 Japan, Lord Yoshii Toranaga fights for his life as his enemies on the Council of Regents unite against him. When a mysterious European ship is found marooned in a nearby fishing village, its English pilot John Blackthorne becomes a valuable pawn in Toranaga's schemes.

one-piece-live-action.title: One Piece (Live Action)
one-piece-live-action.description: Monkey D. Luffy sets off on a grand adventure to find the legendary treasure, One Piece, and become King of the Pirates. Along the way, he recruits a ragtag crew of misfits, each with their own dreams and abilities.

the-night-manager.title: The Night Manager
the-night-manager.description: A former British soldier is recruited by an intelligence agency to infiltrate the inner circle of an arms dealer. A thrilling cat-and-mouse game unfolds across exotic locations as loyalties are tested.

squid-game-season-2.title: Squid Game: Season 2
squid-game-season-2.description: Three years after winning the Squid Game, Player 456 gave up going to the U.S. and came back with a new resolve. Gi-hun dives back into the mysterious survival game, determined to end it from the inside and uncover the people behind it all.

rings-of-power.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Rings of Power
rings-of-power.description: Set thousands of years before the events of The Hobbit and The Lord of the Rings, this epic drama takes place during the Second Age of Middle-earth. From the forging of the Rings of Power to the rise of the Dark Lord Sauron.

the-continental.title: The Continental: From the World of John Wick
the-continental.description: Set in 1970s New York City, this prequel explores the origin of the iconic Continental Hotel. A young Winston Scott is forced to confront a dark past he thought he had left behind when he's drawn into the alluring world of New York's shadowy underworld.

berlin.title: Berlin
berlin.description: A prequel to Money Heist following the charismatic thief Berlin as he recruits a gang to pull off an audacious heist of €44 million in jewels from a high-security auction house in Paris.

slow-horses.title: Slow Horses
slow-horses.description: A dysfunctional team of MI5 agents — who serve in a dumping ground department of British Intelligence known as Slough House — navigate the espionage world's most dangerous challenges. Led by the brilliant but irascible Jackson Lamb.

asur.title: Asur
asur.description: A forensic expert-turned-teacher is drawn back into the dark world of serial killers when a new threat emerges. The series blends Indian mythology with the world of forensic science and cyber crime to create a psychological thriller.

silo.title: Silo
silo.description: In a ruined and toxic future, thousands of people live in a giant underground silo deep below the surface. After the sheriff's death, engineer Juliette Nichols uncovers shocking secrets and learns that the silo's rulers will stop at nothing to protect their way of life.
